owners.name: Marriott
owners.description: Easily tempted by weird drinking games. Useful punchbag for jokes (practical and verbal).

owners.name: Nash
owners.description: Unwavering and delusional support for West Ham United. High degree of data analysis — should be winning the WC sweepstakes.

owners.name: Groves
owners.description: Can't say no to a messy night out. Creates hilarious content as a result.

owners.name: Pitt
owners.description: No coloured hair left on his entire body. Has the ability to provide flight upgrades for unknown nefarious favours.

owners.name: James
owners.description: Boy racer, pushing 40 but still a kid at heart. Loves cars, snow and his torrent of tiny people.

owners.name: Marco
owners.description: Still struggles to pronounce English words even after having lived in the UK for a quarter century. Creates new words like a small Mexican Shakespeare.
